name: Meeting Summarizer Interface
description: Meeting transcript analysis component using Claude API. Provides summarization, structured item extraction, sentiment analysis, and 1:1 meeting preparation generation. Handles text truncation, JSON parsing from LLM responses, and client initialization. Returns None or empty lists on failures.

types.name: MeetingItemKind
types.description: Enumeration of meeting item types that can be extracted from transcripts

types.name: MeetingItemExtract
types.description: Validated meeting item with kind, content, and optional owner

types.name: AscendConfig
types.description: Configuration object for Ascend application (imported from ascend.config)

functions.name: _truncate
functions.description: Truncate text to MAX_INPUT_CHARS (100,000), attempting to break at sentence boundary if truncation occurs beyond half the limit. Appends ' [TRUNCATED]' marker.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Input text to truncate

postconditions: len(output) <= 100000 + len(' [TRUNCATED]')
if len(text) <= 100000 then output == text
if len(text) > 100000 then output ends with ' [TRUNCATED]'

functions.name: _parse_json
functions.description: Parse JSON string, stripping markdown code fences if present (```json...``` or ```...```). Handles leading/trailing whitespace.

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: JSON text to parse, possibly with markdown code fences

error_cases.name: invalid_json
error_cases.condition: text is not valid JSON after fence removal

postconditions: Returns parsed JSON object/array/primitive

functions.name: content_must_be_nonempty
functions.description: Pydantic field validator for MeetingItemExtract.content. Ensures content is non-empty string.

inputs.name: cls
inputs.description: Class being validated (Pydantic convention)

inputs.name: v
inputs.description: Value to validate

error_cases.name: empty_content
error_cases.condition: v is empty string or falsy

postconditions: Returns v unchanged if validation passes

functions.name: get_client
functions.description: Create Anthropic API client from environment variable specified in config. Returns None if API key is missing or client creation fails. Logs warnings/errors on failure.

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object containing API key environment variable name

postconditions: Returns Anthropic client if API key found and valid
Returns None if API key missing or exception occurs
side_effects: Reads environment variable via os.environ.get
Logs warning if API key not set
Logs error on exception

structured_side_effects.description: Reads API key from environment via os.environ.get
Logs warnings and errors for missing API key or client creation failure

functions.name: summarize_transcript
functions.description: Generate 2-4 sentence summary of meeting transcript using Claude API. Returns None on empty input, missing client, API failure, or empty response. Logs operation status.

inputs.name: raw_text
inputs.description: Meeting transcript text to summarize

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object for API client initialization

inputs.name: client
inputs.description: Optional pre-initialized Anthropic client for dependency injection

postconditions: Returns non-empty summary string on success
Returns None if input is empty/whitespace-only
Returns None if client unavailable
Returns None on API errors
side_effects: Calls get_client if client is None
Makes API call to Claude via client.messages.create
Logs operation result via log_operation
Logs errors on exception

structured_side_effects.description: Calls Anthropic Claude API for summarization

functions.name: extract_items
functions.description: Extract structured meeting items (action items, decisions, topics, concerns, wins) from transcript as list of validated dicts. Returns empty list on empty input, missing client, API failure, invalid JSON, or validation errors. Logs warnings for dropped items.

inputs.name: raw_text
inputs.description: Meeting transcript text to extract items from

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object for API client initialization

inputs.name: client
inputs.description: Optional pre-initialized Anthropic client for dependency injection

postconditions: Returns list of validated MeetingItemExtract dicts
Each dict has keys: kind, content, owner
Returns empty list on any failure
Invalid items are dropped with warnings
side_effects: Calls get_client if client is None
Makes API call to Claude via client.messages.create
Logs operation result with item count
Logs warnings for malformed JSON or invalid items
Logs errors on exception

structured_side_effects.description: Calls Anthropic Claude API for item extraction
Logs operation results, warnings for dropped items, and errors

functions.name: analyze_sentiment
functions.description: Analyze overall meeting sentiment, returning float score in [0.0, 1.0] range where 0.0 is very negative and 1.0 is very positive. Returns None on empty input, missing client, API failure, or unparseable response. Clamps out-of-range scores.

inputs.name: raw_text
inputs.description: Meeting transcript text to analyze

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Configuration object for API client initialization

inputs.name: client
inputs.description: Optional pre-initialized Anthropic client for dependency injection

postconditions: Returns float in [0.0, 1.0] on success
Returns None if input is empty/whitespace-only
Returns None if client unavailable
Returns None on API errors or unparseable response
Clamps scores outside [0.0, 1.0] range
side_effects: Calls get_client if client is None
Makes API call to Claude via client.messages.create
Logs operation result on success
Logs warnings for out-of-range scores
Logs errors on exception

structured_side_effects.description: Calls Anthropic Claude API for sentiment analysis
Logs operation results, warnings for clamped scores, and errors

functions.name: generate_prep
functions.description: Generate structured 1:1 meeting preparation plan for team member based on recent meetings, open action items, and optional performance data. Returns None on empty member name, missing config/client, or API failure. Dynamically imports load_config if config is None.

inputs.name: member_name
inputs.description: Name of team member for 1:1 preparation

inputs.name: recent_meetings
inputs.description: List of recent meeting data

inputs.name: open_items
inputs.description: List of open action items

inputs.name: performance_data
inputs.description: Optional performance metrics for the team member

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: Optional configuration object (will be loaded if None)

inputs.name: client
inputs.description: Optional pre-initialized Anthropic client for dependency injection

postconditions: Returns structured prep plan string on success
Returns None if member_name is empty/whitespace-only
Returns None if client unavailable
Returns None on API errors
side_effects: Dynamically imports load_config from ascend.config if config is None
Calls get_client if client is None
Makes API call to Claude via client.messages.create
Logs operation result on success
Logs errors on exception

structured_side_effects.description: Dynamically imports load_config from ascend.config if config is None
Calls Anthropic Claude API for 1:1 prep generation

invariants: All public functions return None or empty collections on failure (defensive returns)
All API-calling functions accept optional client parameter for dependency injection
All functions truncate input via _truncate before API calls
All functions log operations via log_operation or logger
